zh.lifeSummary: Isabella de la Ford是Thomas de la Ford的女兒，出生。她和Walter de Carburra至少有1個兒子。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Isabella de la Ford是Thomas de la Ford的女儿，出生。她和Walter de Carburra至少有1个儿子。

nameMeanings.name: Ford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived near a ford (Middle English, Old English ford), or a habitational name from one of the many places called with this word, such as Ford (Durham, Herefordshire, Northumberland, Shropshire, Sussex), Ford in Sefton (Lancashire), Ford in Crediton and Ford in Holcombe Rogus (both Devon), Ford in Litton and Ford in Wiveliscombe (both Somerset).

Irish: Anglicized form (quasi-translation) of various Gaelic names, for example MacGiolla na Naomh ‘son of Gilla na Naomh’ (a personal name meaning ‘servant of the saints’), Mac Conshámha ‘son of Conshnámha’ (a personal name composed of the elements con ‘dog’ + snámh ‘to swim’), in all of which the final syllable was wrongly thought to be áth ‘ford’, and Ó Fuar(th)áin (see Foran ).

variants.name: Forth
meanings: German: topographic name for someone who lived by a ford, Middle High German vort, vurt, Middle Low German vorde ‘ford, entrance way’, or a habitational name from a place in Franconia or in former Pomerania (now Poland) named Forth.

variants.name: Forde
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Declan, Dermot, Aine, Fionnuala, Liam, Nuala.
English and Irish: variant of   Ford   1 and 2. This is a very common spelling in Ireland.
Norwegian (Førde): habitational name from any of numerous farmsteads named Førde (there are eleven on the west coast), from Old Norse fyrthi, dative of fjǫrthr ‘fjord’.

variants.name: Foran
meanings: Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Fuartháin ‘descendant of Fuarthán’, a personal name derived from fuar ‘cold’. The word fuarán also means ‘spring’ or ‘pool’. The form Fuarthán was understood as fuarathán ‘cold little ford’, and the name has thus sometimes been translated into English as Ford .

nameMeanings.name: Isabella
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: la
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of   Olaf  , also widely used in southwest Sweden.

en.lifeSummary: Isabella de la Ford was born as the daughter of Thomas de la Ford. She had at least 1 son with Walter de Carburra.

fr.lifeSummary: Isabella de la Ford est née, fille de Thomas de la Ford. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec Walter de Carburra.

de.lifeSummary: Isabella de la Ford wurde, als Tochter von Thomas de la Ford geboren. Sie hatte mit Walter de Carburra mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Isabella de la Ford è nata il come figlia di Thomas de la Ford. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio con Walter de Carburra.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabella de la FordはThomas de la Fordの娘として生まれた。彼女はWalter de Carburraとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabella de la Ford(은)는 Thomas de la Ford의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 Walter de Carburra(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Isabella de la Ford nasceu filha de Thomas de la Ford. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho com Walter de Carburra.

ru.lifeSummary: Isabella de la Ford родилась. Её отца звали Thomas de la Ford. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от Walter de Carburra.

es.lifeSummary: Isabella de la Ford nació como hija de Thomas de la Ford. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Walter de Carburra.
